name: AmpSysCadencePlugin
notes: Private AmpSys engine packages are compiled into standalone native core binaries.
The core binary is selected by OS/CPU, not by the user's Python minor version.
For stronger commercial anti-tamper, run a VMProtect/Themida-style protector with --protector-cmd.
Windows core was rebuilt on Windows Python 3.12.
Linux core was rebuilt inside IC617 glibc 2.17 / Python 3.10 for wider Linux compatibility.
Release tiny Spectre LUT was validated on SMIC180MMRF in IC617.
